title: ZAI-89 follow-up: 'PROJECTS' sidebar section header still English in RU
description:
## Goal

Fix the residual i18n leak found by visual QA in [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115): the `PROJECTS` sidebar section header remains English when the UI language is Russian, while sibling section headers (`РАБОТА`, `АГЕНТЫ`, `КОМПАНИЯ`) are correctly translated.

This is in-scope to [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89) (sidebar tail localization) — it was missed when the other section headers were translated.

## Reproduction

1. Run the dev server (`pnpm -C ui dev`).
2. Open `/SDF/inbox/mine` with UI language set to Russian.
3. Observe the section header above `Onboarding` — currently `PROJECTS`, should render in the active locale (e.g. `ПРОЕКТЫ`).

Visual: see `inbox-mine-ru.png` attached to [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115).

## Scope

Single string in the sidebar section-header rendering. Same component family as the other section headers translated by ZAI-89.

## Acceptance

- `PROJECTS` header renders in the active locale, matching the i18n pattern already used for `WORK` / `AGENTS` / `COMPANY`.
- `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh` clean.
- Updated `inbox-mine-ru.png` showing the translated header attached as proof.

## Files (likely)

- `ui/src/components/Sidebar*.tsx` — section-header rendering. Search for the literal `PROJECTS` string.
- `ui/src/locales/{en,ru}/sidebar.json` (or wherever the other section keys live) — add the new translation key alongside the existing section headers.
